name: DeepAR
description: Face-tracking and AR effects SDK for iOS, Android, Web, Unity and Unreal with 3D face masks, filters and background segmentation.

seo.title: DeepAR — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: DeepAR: Face-tracking and AR effects SDK for iOS, Android, Web, Unity and Unreal with 3D face masks, filters and background segmentation.

when_to_use: Adding real-time face AR effects to mobile apps via SDK
Building Snapchat-style face filters for social features
Integrating virtual try-on for glasses or makeup in e-commerce
Deploying face tracking and beautification on web browsers

cons: Quality trails Banuba on top-end effects
review.verdict: Best value face-AR SDK when you want cross-platform reach without Banuba-tier pricing.
review.best_for: Consumer app developers wanting face AR across web and mobile
review.not_for: Studios chasing highest-end realism for flagship social apps

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
